final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It stores a 16-bit value and outputs it when read. However, writing to the cell does not update its value.
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we, // write enable  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory; // 16-bit memory cell  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            memory <= data_in; // Write data when we is high  
        end  
        data_out <= memory; // Always output current memory value  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It stores a 16-bit value and outputs it when read. However, writing to the cell does not update its value.
